title: The Abandoned Zoo
lines: The gates of the local wildlife park have been bent outward, and the roar from inside doesn't sound human.
Overgrown ivy chokes the snack bars, and several cages are shattered. The air is thick with a smell you recognize from the barn...
Something is pacing in the shadows of the Big Cat exhibit ahead.

options.desc: 1. Search for items in the visitor center
2. Listen quietly to the sounds of the zoo
